mapper.select: select definition_id as definitionId, model_id as modelId, definition_key as definitionKey, definition_name as definitionName, definition_version as definitionVersion, category_id_snapshot as categoryIdSnapshot, category_name_snapshot as categoryNameSnapshot, form_type_snapshot as formTypeSnapshot, form_id_snapshot as formIdSnapshot, form_name_snapshot as formNameSnapshot, form_schema_snapshot_json as formSchemaSnapshotJson, simple_model_snapshot_json as simpleModelSnapshotJson, compiled_bpmn_xml as compiledBpmnXml, start_rule_snapshot_json as startRuleSnapshotJson, manager_scope_snapshot_json as managerScopeSnapshotJson, title_rule_snapshot_json as titleRuleSnapshotJson, summary_rule_snapshot_json as summaryRuleSnapshotJson, variable_mapping_snapshot_json as variableMappingSnapshotJson, lifecycle_state as lifecycleState, start_state as startState, engine_process_definition_id as engineProcessDefinitionId, published_by_name_snapshot as publishedByNameSnapshot, published_at as publishedAt from t_bpm_definition where definition_id = #{definitionId}
select * from t_bpm_definition where definition_key = #{definitionKey} and lifecycle_state = 1 order by definition_version desc limit 1

select definition_id as definitionId, definition_key as definitionKey, definition_name as definitionName, definition_version as definitionVersion, category_name_snapshot as categoryNameSnapshot, form_name_snapshot as formNameSnapshot from t_bpm_definition where lifecycle_state = 1 and start_state = 1 order by published_at desc, definition_id desc
